Maria Santos, RN, BSN
Registered Nurse — Critical Care, New York, NY
maria.santos.rn@example.com | 555-201-3002 | linkedin.com/in/maria-santos-rn

SUMMARY
Registered nurse with 7 years of acute and critical care experience in a Level I
trauma center. Skilled in patient assessment, medication administration, and
care plan coordination for high-acuity patients. BLS, ACLS, and CCRN certified.

EXPERIENCE
Registered Nurse, Medical ICU — Metropolitan Hospital (2019–present)
- Provide direct patient care for a 24-bed medical intensive care unit, managing
  ventilated and post-operative patients with complex care plans.
- Administer medications, titrate vasoactive drips, and document assessments in
  the Epic electronic health record (EHR) in compliance with HIPAA.
- Serve as charge nurse, coordinating triage, staffing, and infection-control
  protocols; precept new graduate nurses on the unit.

Staff Nurse, Med-Surg — Riverside Community Hospital (2017–2019)
- Delivered nursing care for medical-surgical patients; led patient-safety and
  fall-prevention initiatives that reduced unit incidents.

SKILLS
Nursing, patient care, critical care, acute care, medication administration,
care plans, patient assessment, triage, Epic EHR, electronic health records,
BLS, ACLS, CCRN, patient safety, HIPAA, infection control

LICENSES & EDUCATION
RN License, New York State | BLS, ACLS, CCRN
B.S. Nursing (BSN), Hunter College, 2017
